planets.name: Good
planets.summary: Archive cluster around good: 822 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2025-08-17
artifacts.excerpt:
what i learned not looking at screens for 3 weeks

it was extremely pleasant. i had some minor like withdrawal symptoms for the first 6 hours where I kept wanting to check my phone, but after that I was relieved that I no longer was drawn into screen staring

i started off by having my gf check all my messages for me, which was wonderful <3. we ended up on settling for a 20 minute session where I'd bulk reply to all important messages, since dictating was becoming onerous. 

i also needed to carry the phone around sometimes when meeting up with people who didn't have my dumb phone's number. i did a pretty decent job of not touching it unless i actually needed to.

i wish i could say i got some crazy superpowers, but it was exactly what you'd expect. i felt like i had more time. my day didn't slip by like it used to. i got a hell of a lot more reading done, to the tune of one book every 3
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: good, think, yeah, really.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-08-13
artifacts.excerpt:
Also quick follow up in case yall don't know 

- cans have plastic linings which leach BPA. If BPA free they instead leach BPS which is ~as bad

- takeout containers are lined in either PFAS or BPA

- paper cartons also lined with above

- food prod. equip also has PFAS linings
